description_long: This is a large, ultra-wide curved computer monitor with a sleek, modern design. The front features a gently curved display with a thin, light-colored bezel that frames the screen, enhancing its immersive appearance. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, arched stand that connects centrally to the rear, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The back of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle seam running horizontally, and the stand attachment is prominent. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall color scheme is a combination of light gray and dark blue, with the screen displaying a Windows desktop background. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal components in the stand.
description: A large, ultra-wide curved monitor with a thin bezel and a modern arched stand, finished in light gray and dark blue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved display with a thin bezel and the screen powered on.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curvature of the screen and the depth of the stand attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, seamless back panel and the central stand connection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curve and the monitor's slim profile.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, light gray, and has a smooth, matte finish with slightly rounded corners and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is an arched, crescent-shaped pedestal made of metal or metallic-finished plastic, centrally attached to the rear of the monitor, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
